revision.text:
'''井狩 正司'''（いかり・まさし、1916年 - 2011年）は、文学者、元[[日本大学文理学部]][[教授]]、元[[隅田川神社]][[宮司]]。
==主な著作== *『平家物語：類従抄本』[[東京書院]]、[[1948年]]。 *『建礼門院右京大夫集』東宝書房、[[1956年]]5月。 *『校本建礼門院右京大夫集』東宝書房、[[1959年]]5月。 *『校本建礼門院右京大夫集』[[笠間書院]]、[[1967年]]4月。 *『更級日記』』[[おうふう|桜楓社→おうふう]]、[[1968年]][[4月25日]]。 *『建礼門院右京大夫集：校本及び総索引』』笠間書院]]、[[1969年]]（編著）。 *『御物本更級日記』桜楓社→おうふう、[[1970年]]。
==関連項目== *[[日本大学文理学部]] *[[鈴木知太郎]] *[[柳田忠則]]
{{デフォルトソート:いかり まさし}} {{Writer-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:いかり まさし}} [[Category:日本文学研究者]] [[Category:日本の文学研究者]] [[Category:日本大学の教員]] [[Category:神奈川県出身の人物]] [[Category:1916年生]] [[Category:2011年没]]

'''井狩 正司'''（いかり・まさし、1916年 - 2011年）は、文学者、元[[日本大学文理学部]][[教授]]、元[[隅田川神社]][[宮司]]。
==主な著作== *『平家物語：類従抄本』[[東京書院]]、[[1948年]]。 *『建礼門院右京大夫集』東宝書房、[[1956年]]5月。 *『校本建礼門院右京大夫集』東宝書房、[[1959年]]5月。 *『校本建礼門院右京大夫集』[[笠間書院]]、[[1967年]]4月。 *『更級日記』』[[おうふう|桜楓社→おうふう]]、[[1968年]][[4月25日]]。 *『建礼門院右京大夫集：校本及び総索引』』笠間書院]]、[[1969年]]（編著）。 *『御物本更級日記』桜楓社→おうふう、[[1970年]]。
==関連項目== *[[日本大学文理学部]] *[[鈴木知太郎]] *[[柳田忠則]]

'''井狩 正司'''（いかり・まさし、1916年 - 2011年）は、文学者。1934年、旧制・[[日本大学第一中学校・高等学校|日本大学中学校]]（現・日本大学第一高等学校）卒業。元[[日本大学文理学部]][[教授]]、元[[隅田川神社]][[宮司]]。
==主な著作== *『平家物語：類従抄本』[[東京書院]]、[[1948年]]。 *『建礼門院右京大夫集』東宝書房、[[1956年]]5月。 *『校本建礼門院右京大夫集』東宝書房、[[1959年]]5月。 *『校本建礼門院右京大夫集』[[笠間書院]]、[[1967年]]4月。 *『更級日記』』[[おうふう|桜楓社→おうふう]]、[[1968年]][[4月25日]]。 *『建礼門院右京大夫集：校本及び総索引』』笠間書院]]、[[1969年]]（編著）。 *『御物本更級日記』桜楓社→おうふう、[[1970年]]。
== 関連項目 == * [[日本大学文理学部]] * [[鈴木知太郎]] * [[柳田忠則]]

revision.text:
'''Masashi Ikari''' (井狩 正司, 1916–2011) was a Japanese scholar of national literature. In 1934, he graduated from the former {{ill|Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|ja|日本大学第一中学校・高等学校}} (now Nihon University First High School). He served as a professor at the {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部}} and as the chief priest of {{ill|Sumida River Shrine|ja|隅田川神社}}.
== Major Works == * ''Heike Monogatari: Ruijū Shōhon'' (平家物語：類従抄本). Tokyo Shoin, 1948. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1956. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1959. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Kasama Shoin, April 1967. * ''Sarashina Nikki'' (更級日記). {{ill|Ōfūsha|ja|桜楓社}} (later Ōfū), April 25, 1968. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū: Kōhon oyobi Sōsakuin'' (建礼門院右京大夫集：校本及び総索引). Kasama Shoin, 1969 (Edited). * ''Gomotsuhon Sarashina Nikki'' (御物本更級日記). Ōfūsha (later Ōfū), 1970. == See Also == * {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部}} * {{ill|Chitarō Suzuki|ja|鈴木知太郎}} * {{ill|Tadanori Yanagida|ja|柳田忠則}}
{{Writer-stub}}
{{Normdaten}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ikari Masashi}}

'''Masashi Ikari''' (井狩 正司, 1916–2011) was a Japanese scholar of national literature. In 1934, he graduated from the former {{ill|Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|ja|日本大学第一中学校・高等学校}} (now Nihon University First High School). He served as a professor at the {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部}} and as the chief priest of {{ill|Sumida River Shrine|ja|隅田川神社}}.
== Major Works == * ''Heike Monogatari: Ruijū Shōhon'' (平家物語：類従抄本). Tokyo Shoin, 1948. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1956. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1959. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Kasama Shoin, April 1967. * ''Sarashina Nikki'' (更級日記). {{ill|Ōfūsha|ja|桜楓社}} (later Ōfū), April 25, 1968. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū: Kōhon oyobi Sōsakuin'' (建礼門院右京大夫集：校本及び総索引). Kasama Shoin, 1969 (Edited). * ''Gomotsuhon Sarashina Nikki'' (御物本更級日記). Ōfūsha (later Ōfū), 1970. == See Also == * {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部}} * {{ill|Chitarō Suzuki|ja|鈴木知太郎}} * {{ill|Tadanori Yanagida|ja|柳田忠則}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:井狩正司]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1916|death_date=2011|birth_place={{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513}}|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|nationality={{ill|Empire of Japan|qid=Q188712}}; {{ill|Japan|qid=Q17}}|native_name=井狩正司}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q17361262]] Wikidata name: Masashi Ikari [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Masashi Ikari''' (井狩 正司, 1916–2011) was a Japanese scholar of national literature. In 1934, he graduated from the former {{ill|Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|ja|日本大学第一中学校・高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|qq=|1=First Junior & Senior High School of Nihon University|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11507861}} (now Nihon University First High School). He served as a professor at the {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本大学文理学部・大学院文学研究科及び総合基礎科学研究科|1=Nihon University College of Humanities and Sciences|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125120920}} and as the chief priest of {{ill|Sumida River Shrine|ja|隅田川神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumida River Shrine|qq=|1=Sumidagawa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658854}}.
== Major Works == * ''Heike Monogatari: Ruijū Shōhon'' (平家物語：類従抄本). Tokyo Shoin, 1948. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1956. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1959. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Kasama Shoin, April 1967. * ''Sarashina Nikki'' (更級日記). {{ill|Ōfūsha|ja|桜楓社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōfūsha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to おうふう|1=Ōfūsha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11261202}} (later Ōfū), April 25, 1968. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū: Kōhon oyobi Sōsakuin'' (建礼門院右京大夫集：校本及び総索引). Kasama Shoin, 1969 (Edited). * ''Gomotsuhon Sarashina Nikki'' (御物本更級日記). Ōfūsha (later Ōfū), 1970.
== See Also == * {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本大学文理学部・大学院文学研究科及び総合基礎科学研究科|1=Nihon University College of Humanities and Sciences|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125120920}} * {{ill|Chitarō Suzuki|ja|鈴木知太郎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chitarō Suzuki|qq=|1=Tomotarō Suzuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649111}} * {{ill|Tadanori Yanagida|ja|柳田忠則|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tadanori Yanagida|qq=|1=Tadanori Yanagita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11534566}}
{{Writer-stub}}

In 1934, he graduated from the former {{ill|Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|ja|日本大学第一中学校・高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|qq=|1=First Junior & Senior High School of Nihon University|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11507861}} (now Nihon University First High School). Tōhō Shobō, May 1956. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1959. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:井狩正司]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:井狩正司]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:井狩正司]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1916|death_date=2011|birth_place={{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513}}|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097}}|nationality={{ill|Empire of Japan|WD=Q188712}}; {{ill|Japan|WD=Q17}}|native_name=井狩正司}} '''Masashi Ikari''' (井狩 正司, 1916–2011) was a Japanese scholar of national literature. In 1934, he graduated from the former {{ill|Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|ja|日本大学第一中学校・高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihon University First Junior High School and High School|1=First Junior & Senior High School of Nihon University|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11507861}} (now Nihon University First High School). He served as a professor at the {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本大学文理学部・大学院文学研究科及び総合基礎科学研究科|1=Nihon University College of Humanities and Sciences|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125120920}} and as the chief priest of {{ill|Sumida River Shrine|ja|隅田川神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumida River Shrine|1=Sumidagawa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11658854}}.
== Major Works == * ''Heike Monogatari: Ruijū Shōhon'' (平家物語：類従抄本). Tokyo Shoin, 1948. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1956. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Tōhō Shobō, May 1959. * ''Kōhon Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū'' (校本建礼門院右京大夫集). Kasama Shoin, April 1967. * ''Sarashina Nikki'' (更級日記). {{ill|Ōfūsha|ja|桜楓社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōfūsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to おうふう|1=Ōfūsha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11261202}} (later Ōfū), April 25, 1968. * ''Kenreimon'in Ukyo no Daibu-shū: Kōhon oyobi Sōsakuin'' (建礼門院右京大夫集：校本及び総索引). Kasama Shoin, 1969 (Edited). * ''Gomotsuhon Sarashina Nikki'' (御物本更級日記). Ōfūsha (later Ōfū), 1970.
== See Also == * {{ill|Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja|日本大学文理学部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Faculty of Letters and Sciences, Nihon University|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本大学文理学部・大学院文学研究科及び総合基礎科学研究科|1=Nihon University College of Humanities and Sciences|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q125120920}} * {{ill|Chitarō Suzuki|ja|鈴木知太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chitarō Suzuki|1=Tomotarō Suzuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11649111}} * {{ill|Tadanori Yanagida|ja|柳田忠則|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tadanori Yanagida|1=Tadanori Yanagita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11534566}}
{{Writer-stub}}
{{translated page|ja|井狩正司|version=97452446|comment=Imported full ja history}}
